The three pillars of the Cialdini Institute are: Science, Application, and Ethics.
Creating your personal action plan is crucial for the application of your learnings. After this course,
not only will you have an actionable plan for two big influential challenges you're facing - but you
will have learned a process that will assist you in applying this knowledge for the rest of your life.
To get the maximum learning experience, we advise you to answer these 5 questions before you
continue. By doing this you will gain a better understanding of your case, and therefore a better
outcome.
What is your influence challenge?
Who is involved?
What do you hope to accomplish?
What barriers exist to obtaining a positive outcome?
What are some solutions to the problem that you’ve been considering?
You can answer these questions in your Influence Challenge Template available for download below.
Click "Download" to download the PDF or PPT version of your personal action plan.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
